Thus, none of the listed options accurately describe antigenic drift correctly.

Final decision: Disagree with any single option being true. All provided statements are factually inaccurate.

Answer choice: NONE OF THE ABOVE

I do not believe any individual statement among these reflects an accurate definition of antigenic drift.
